workingPrinciple: Alternating Current (AC) is stepped (via transformer), rectified to pulsating Direct Current (DC), smoothed by capacitors, and regulated to a steady DC level.
steps: Rectifier converts AC to pulsating DC
microscopicExplanation: Rectification uses diodes to pass only one polarity; the reservoir capacitor supplies current between peaks, and the regulator removes residual ripple.
